summary: Tested P0 (Operators revenue fix), P2 (Ratings bulk moderation), and P3 (Customer Service refactoring). All features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created 3 test ratings for bulk moderation testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0, P2, P3 features verified and working. Operators Management page shows correct revenue (West Region Tours: 169,325 FCFA, Royal Events Cameroon: 262,500 FCFA). Ratings page has bulk selection with checkboxes and bulk action buttons (Flag All, Unflag All, Hide All, Show All, Delete All). Customer Service page loads correctly with Dashboard, Tickets, and Team tabs. TicketCard component has data-testid attributes.

P0_operators_revenue.test: Operators Management page shows correct revenue

details.revenue_calculation: Aggregates from orders collection where operator_id matches and status in [completed, confirmed, pending]

P2_ratings_bulk_selection.test: Ratings page has checkbox on each rating for selection
P2_ratings_bulk_selection.details: Each rating card has a checkbox for individual selection

P2_ratings_select_all.test: Ratings page has 'Select all' checkbox in bulk actions bar
P2_ratings_select_all.details: Bulk actions bar shows 'Select ratings for bulk actions' with checkbox

P2_ratings_bulk_actions_bar.test: Bulk actions bar appears when ratings are selected
P2_ratings_bulk_actions_bar.details: Shows selection count and buttons: Flag All, Unflag All, Hide All, Show All, Delete All

P2_bulk_moderate_endpoint.test: Backend endpoint POST /api/ratings/bulk-moderate exists and works
P2_bulk_moderate_endpoint.details: Endpoint accepts rating_ids array and action (flag/unflag/hide/unhide/delete)

P3_customer_service_loads.test: Customer Service page loads correctly after component refactoring
P3_customer_service_loads.details: Page loads with title 'Customer Service Center' and all tabs visible

P3_ticket_cards.test: Customer Service ticket cards display properly
P3_ticket_cards.details: Found 8 ticket cards with data-testid attributes

P3_filters_panel.details: Filters button present, search bar functional, sub-tabs (Open, In Progress, Closed) working
